reforms.description: The restructuring of nationalised industries within the ÔIAG group aimed to improve efficiency and reduce losses, with a focus on internationalisation and investment in high-growth sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The focus on improving efficiency and investing in high-growth sectors is expected to enhance productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented as part of the restructuring efforts.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in nationalised industries aimed at enhancing their performance.
reforms.source_quote: The restructuring of ÔIAG has now been almost completed. This has involved a new investment strategy, a further drive towards internationalisation of activities and an overall reorganisation of the holding company.

reforms.description: In January 1989, a comprehensive tax reform was implemented, lowering both direct personal and corporate tax rates while broadening the tax base to address issues related to redistribution, tax base erosion, and distortions in incentives to work, save, and invest.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to create a more efficient tax system that encourages investment and economic activity, thereby supporting growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax reform has been successfully implemented as of January 1989.
reforms.importance_rationale: The tax reform is a major overhaul of the tax system, significantly impacting economic incentives.
reforms.source_quote: In January 1989, a comprehensive tax reform has taken effect, involving a lowering of both direct personal and corporate tax rates, as well as a broadening of the tax base.
